title: Exotic Spanish Fish Paella
description: A flavorful and vibrant Spanish dish featuring tahini and spherified egg yolk, perfect for a romantic date night. This paella is not only delicious, but also anti-inflammatory-friendly and packed with nutrients.
instructions: Heat the grapeseed oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the thinly sliced onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the thinly sliced red bell pepper and cook for an additional 3 minutes.
Add the chopped garden cress and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the saffron-infused vegetable broth to the pan and bring to a simmer.
Add the chermoula-spiced cod fillets to the pan and cook for 5-7 minutes, or until cooked through.
While the cod is cooking, prepare the tahini sauce by whisking together the tahini, lemon juice, and a pinch of salt in a small bowl.
Spherify the egg yolks by combining the sodium alginate and calcium chloride in a small bowl, then slowly adding in the egg yolks while whipping with a fork.
Once the cod is cooked, remove it from the pan and set aside.
Add the chopped parsley to the pan and stir to combine.
To serve, place a cod fillet on each plate, then spoon the paella mixture over the top.
Drizzle the tahini sauce over the top of each plate, followed by the spherified egg yolks.
